description: The issue was addressed with improved checks. This issue is fixed in Safari 16.6, iOS 15.7.8 and iPadOS 15.7.8, macOS Ventura 13.5, iOS 16.6 and iPadOS 16.6, watchOS 9.6, tvOS 16.6. Processing web content may lead to arbitrary code execution.
